executive_summary: Five of six user stories (US-002 through US-006) fully comply. US-001 (Bun build pipeline) does not comply: no build script exists to produce cross-platform standalone binaries. All other FRs are satisfied.
minor_observations: README installation commands use 'node cli/zikon.js install' — needs updating for binary download workflow after US-001.
ensure_profile_path_entry() creates ~/.bashrc/~/.zshrc even if absent; unexpected for non-bash/zsh shell users.
Missing dependency check exits with EXIT_GENERATION_ERROR (1) rather than EXIT_INVALID_ARGUMENTS (3) — minor semantic mismatch.
Apple Silicon VRAM is read from system RAM (unified memory); technically correct but may overstate GPU inference budget.
No integration tests against a real filesystem; all install tests use stubs/mocks.
Windows zikon.cmd shim hardcodes relative path '%~dp0\..\cli\zikon.js'; breaks if bin/ is relocated.
conclusions_and_recommendations: Implement the Bun build pipeline (scripts/build.js + package.json 'build' script), fix PROJECT_ROOT path resolution in cli/zikon.js for compiled binary mode, and update README with binary download instructions.

refactor_plan.title: Create scripts/build.js
refactor_plan.description: Node.js build script: run 'bun build --compile' for linux-x64, darwin-x64, win32-x64; output to dist/; copy scripts/ to dist/scripts/; exit non-zero on failure.

refactor_plan.title: Fix PROJECT_ROOT in cli/zikon.js for compiled binary mode
refactor_plan.description: Detect whether scripts/ exists at parent (dev mode) or at same level (compiled binary). Use path.join(__dirname, '..') in dev mode and __dirname in compiled mode.

refactor_plan.title: Update README.md Installation section
refactor_plan.description: Add binary download subsection with chmod+x and ./zikon-linux install steps. Label existing git clone flow as 'from source'.
